name: domino-multiplayer-root
description: Root folder for Domino Multiplayer Game

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm start --prefix backend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test:e2e: npm run db:seed:test && start-server-and-test dev http://localhost:5173 cy:run
